name: Backless Halter Denim Mirror Selfie
description: Rear-side mirror selfie with backless chain halter, denim texture fidelity, and ControlNet pose/depth locks
input_prompt: curvy woman rear side profile mirror selfie maroon backless halter denim jeans

subject.description: young woman with curvy athletic physique captured from rear and side profile, neutral focused expression

distinguishing_features: long dark voluminous curls with ringlets
neutral focused expression checking phone screen

physical_details.body_type: curvy athletic with pronounced hip-to-waist ratio, emphasized glute contour, toned open-back musculature

skin.texture: natural skin texture with visible pores and subtle tonal variation

hair.style: long voluminous curls to mid-back with distinct ringlets
hair.details: dense curl definition and strand-level separation

face.features: side profile with sharp jawline, soft makeup, defined brows
face.gaze: eyes directed to phone screen in reflection

clothing.material: smooth fabric with metallic chain detail
clothing.details: full back exposure with delicate chain strap running down spine and bead-like embellishments

clothing.fit: tight fit accentuating hips and glutes
clothing.details: distinct back-pocket stitching in an American Eagle-inspired pattern

accessories: thin gold chain necklace with butterfly pendant

pose_action.position: standing with back mostly toward mirror, torso twisted slightly right for side profile visibility, hips shifted to emphasize curve
pose_action.camera_relation: mirror selfie medium shot framed from mid-thigh to top of head
pose_action.dynamic_elements: right arm raised holding white smartphone, left arm relaxed by side, slight lower-back arch, manicured nails with light tips

background: wooden door with horizontal panels and silver doorknob on frame left
white wall on frame right with black-framed botanical artwork
white shelf surface below artwork with round woven macrame placemat
mirror lower edge showing electrical outlets and switches below reflection line
environment.atmosphere: casual home interior with practical decor

lighting.direction: front light from behind mirror with ambient room fill
effects: even illumination on skin and denim
subtle shadowing along spinal groove and back muscle definition
balanced detail retention in dark curls and bright white phone

constraints: maintain separation between subject and background elements

realism_anchors: denim weave and pocket stitching clarity
wood grain detail on door panels
natural skin pores and tonal micro-variation
phone edge and case detail retained
negative_prompt: direct eye contact with camera lens

flattened_prompt: masterpiece, photorealistic mirror selfie, young woman with curvy athletic silhouette and tan skin, rear-side profile orientation, long dark voluminous ringlet curls to mid-back, maroon backless halter top with metallic spine-chain detail, light wash tight denim jeans with distinct back-pocket stitching, right arm raised holding white smartphone, left arm relaxed, slight lower-back arch and hip shift, indoor bedroom with wood paneled door and botanical framed wall art, white shelf and woven placemat, mirror edge with electrical outlets visible, soft diffused light from mirror side, subtle spine shadows, clear denim texture and hair strands, 26mm mobile lens look, 4k, natural grain, 3:4 vertical
negative_prompt_flat: flattened curves, missing reflection, missing phone, skin smoothing, distorted fingers, extra limbs, cartoon, anime, 3d render, watermark

color_palette.primary: maroon halter and tan skin tones
color_palette.secondary: light denim blue and white walls
color_palette.accent: gold jewelry and warm wood brown

flux.prompt: photoreal mirror selfie, rear-side profile young woman with curvy athletic shape and tan skin, long dark ringlet curls, maroon backless halter with metallic spine chain, light wash tight denim jeans with stitched pockets, right hand holding white smartphone, slight lumbar arch and hip shift, bedroom interior wood panel door black-framed botanical art white shelf woven placemat, mirror edge with outlets visible, soft diffused lighting, 26mm mobile perspective, texture-rich skin denim hair, 3:4
flux.negative_prompt: flattened curves, missing phone, missing reflection, facing forward, skin smoothing, bad hands, extra limbs, anime, cartoon

subject.description: Young woman with curvy athletic silhouette in rear-side mirror pose

body.physique: Prominent hip-to-waist ratio, emphasized glute contour, toned back
body.anatomy: Twisted torso profile with preserved shoulder-hip-spine relationships
body.details: Natural pores, soft contour gradients, visible back muscle definition

wardrobe.top: Backless maroon halter top with metallic chain detail running down spine
wardrobe.bottom: Light wash fitted denim jeans with distinct stitched back pockets
wardrobe.accessories: Thin gold butterfly pendant necklace and small gold hoops

pose_action.description: Back toward mirror, torso rotated right, head turned to phone screen, right arm raised holding phone
pose_action.posture: Slight lower-back arch with hips shifted for curve emphasis

scene.environment: Bedroom interior with wood paneled door, framed botanical print, white shelf, and woven placemat
scene.reflection_integrity: Phone and reflection must both be visible and spatially consistent

lighting.effects: Subtle spinal shadows and balanced highlight rolloff on denim and skin

camera.technical: 26mm smartphone mirror selfie, high texture fidelity, slight natural grain
camera.negative_constraints: no missing phone, no missing reflection, no skin smoothing, no hand distortion, no anatomy averaging

controlnet.pose_control: DWPose weight 1.0 for skeletal lock and phone-arm placement
controlnet.depth_control: MiDaS weight 0.8 for subject-background separation and depth stability

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A photoreal mirror selfie of a young woman with tan skin and a curvy athletic silhouette, shown from a rear and side profile angle. She has long dark voluminous curls with clear ringlets cascading to mid-back. She wears a maroon backless halter top exposing the full back, with a decorative metallic chain strap running vertically down the spine, and light wash fitted denim jeans with visible stitched back pockets. Her right arm is raised holding a white smartphone while her left arm rests by her side. She stands with a subtle twist and slight lumbar arch, hips shifted, and her side profile looking at the phone screen in the reflection. The bedroom background includes a wood-paneled door with silver knob, a black-framed botanical print on a white wall, and a white shelf with a round woven placemat. Include the lower mirror edge and visible wall outlets beneath. Soft diffused lighting, natural skin texture, denim weave detail, ringlet hair detail, and realistic mirror geometry. No smoothing, no beautify filters, no distorted fingers, no missing phone, no missing reflection.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language format with strict reflection and anatomy constraints

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: explicit outfit construction, pose mechanics, and room anchors
2_realism_anchors: denim weave, ringlets, wood grain, pores, and reflection geometry
3_technical_camera: mirror selfie perspective with 26mm mobile look and 3:4 output
4_negative_hygiene: strict exclusions for smoothing, missing reflection, and hand errors
5_spatial_consistency: DWPose + MiDaS lock preserves body pose and depth ordering
6_lighting_storytelling: soft ambient light with contour-defining shadows
7_texture_priority: high-fidelity treatment for denim, curls, and skin
